name: Scrum Master
description: Workshops focused on Scrum Master certification and facilitation skills.

featured_image.title: Scrum Master Workshop
featured_image.alt: A team collaborating during a Scrum ceremony

acf.workshop_description: The Scrum Master workshop prepares participants to facilitate Scrum ceremonies, shield the development team from external interruptions, remove impediments, and coach both team members and the wider organisation in agile principles. Delegates leave with the knowledge and confidence to drive sprint success and continuous improvement.
acf.workshop_tagline: Master the Art of Agile Facilitation

name: Product Owner
description: Workshops for Product Owner certification and backlog management.

featured_image.title: Product Owner Workshop
featured_image.alt: A product owner reviewing a backlog on a whiteboard

acf.workshop_description: The Product Owner workshop equips participants with the skills to manage product backlogs, articulate a compelling product vision, write actionable user stories, and continuously maximise the value delivered to stakeholders. Participants learn prioritisation techniques, stakeholder communication, and how to make data-driven decisions.

name: Agile Coach
description: Advanced coaching workshops for experienced agile practitioners.

featured_image.title: Agile Coach Workshop
featured_image.alt: An agile coach working with a team

acf.workshop_description: The Agile Coach workshop develops enterprise-level coaching skills, enabling practitioners to guide organisations through agile transformations, build high-performing teams, and embed a culture of continuous improvement. Advanced topics include systemic coaching, scaling frameworks, and organisational change management.

name: Kanban Practitioner
description: Workshops on Kanban methodology and flow-based delivery.

featured_image.title: Kanban Practitioner Workshop
featured_image.alt: A Kanban board with workflow cards

acf.workshop_description: The Kanban Practitioner workshop teaches participants to design, implement and continuously improve Kanban systems for sustainable flow, reduced cycle times, and predictable delivery. Topics include WIP limits, service classes, flow metrics, and using data to drive improvement decisions.

name: DevOps Engineer
description: Workshops covering DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and team collaboration.

featured_image.title: DevOps Engineer Workshop
featured_image.alt: Developers collaborating over a CI/CD pipeline dashboard

acf.workshop_description: The DevOps Engineer workshop bridges the gap between development and operations, covering automation, infrastructure-as-code, continuous integration, and delivery pipelines to accelerate safe software releases. Participants gain hands-on experience with modern DevOps toolchains and cultural practices that enable high-frequency deployments.
